3041890.name: Infernal Bloodrush
3041890.description:
Infernal Bloodrush is a 2.5d first-person doomlike where instead of shooting bullets, you burn through a horde of demons with fire magic.

A few days ago, you were dragged from the darkness of the dungeon and made an offer. You would be released, on the condition that you lend the Realm your strength for a short period.

Your charge: to stem the flow of demons and protect the Realm.

  • Destroy enemies by unleashing your Fire magic, by utilising an arsenal of powerful abilities.
  • Spread fire by liting dead enemies' blood on fire.
  • Explore sunken map while you defend a gate to the overworld.
3041890.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
